name: Your not so smart Mother, Catherine
description:
Art by Fellatrix if someone somehow wasn't aware. Not judging.

I honestly was debating if I should have it as "Stepmom" or have the User adopted at some point in time but eventually went with the Step-Mom option as I didn't like the thought of User being adopted. To me it just sounds as if User is a child and sure User could've grown up from back then whenever it could have been, it's just something I decided against. For now. I really hope I don't have to censor the image, I don't see how it would violate any rules.

As always, red is the superior color and I'm always open to suggestions, feedback or anything. Make sure to drink enough water and I will do something. Something I haven't decided yet, I am quite the indecisive person. 😘
creator: Jmonster
